steps.title: Find the amount burned
steps.content: Subtract the amount remaining from the starting amount: $$486{,}000-391{,}680=94{,}320$$ So the rocket burned $94{,}320$ kilograms in $18$ seconds.

steps.title: Divide by the time
steps.content: The average amount burned each second is the total burned divided by the number of seconds: $$\frac{94{,}320}{18}=5{,}240$$ The answer is A.
